description_long: This rifle features a long, slender barrel mounted on a robust receiver, with a distinctive orange and black color scheme. The stock is minimalistic and appears to be a skeletonized or frame-style design, providing structural support while reducing weight. The rifle is mounted on a flat, dark platform adjacent to a tall, tan wall, suggesting it may be part of a display or testing rig. The action and trigger assembly are clearly visible, with mechanical linkages extending from the receiver. The magazine is not clearly visible, and the sighting system appears to be absent or not detailed. The overall construction suggests a modern, possibly semi-automatic or automatic rifle intended for urban or tactical use.
description: A modern rifle with a skeletonized stock, long barrel, and orange-black coloration, mounted on a flat platform next to a tan wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the skeletonized stock, and the mechanical linkage extending from the receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's alignment, the orange mechanical assembly, and the rifle's placement against the wall.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the length of the barrel and the minimalistic stock, with the linkage and receiver visible.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by the tan wall, with the rifle mostly obscured and only the mounting context visible.
